citation: HUD ML 2023-05 Table A row "Term > 15yr, LTV > 95%, <= $726,200"; HUD ML 2013-04 termination rule
comment: Hand-calc: principal=$400k, original_value=$410k -> LTV=$400k/$410k=0.97560975... > 0.95 -> row [term<=360, 0.95<LTV<=1.00, <=$726,200] -> annual_mip_rate=0.0055. UFMIP = $400,000 * 0.0175 = $7,000.00. LTV>0.90 -> life_of_loan termination.
